before.fresh_worktree_validation: failed when OpenUI bridge node_modules were absent
before.spa_decode_budget: up to 54 server decodes during initial prefetch

after.validation: hybrid parser uses the official bridge when available and the Lark backend otherwise
after.web_only_install: CPU loading falls back to the committed ONNX artifacts only when torch is unavailable
after.spa_decode_budget: three numbered server attempts followed by at most three browser attempts per sample
after.browser_backend_fallback: rejects WebGPU adapters below the model's 65536-byte workgroup-storage requirement, retries later inference backends, and bounds readiness/prompt waits
after.wiring_fallback: when both model paths are unavailable, renders an explicit fixture fallback marked unusable for training unless a human corrects it
after.route_unmount: aborts in-flight generation and destroys late browser sessions

verification.focused_backend_tests: 16 passed in 0.67s, including fixture training-exclusion regression
verification.playwright_suites: desktop 12/12 passed in 58.5s; mobile 12/12 passed in 1.0m

real_browser_execution.browser: Windows Chrome driven from WSL Playwright
real_browser_execution.backend_notes: three server attempts returned invalid DSL; WebGPU was skipped at 32768 < 65536 and WASM rejected GatherBlockQuantized(1) before the labeled fallback rendered

outcome: usable, error-free fixture-demo runtime with full annotation/correction flow; no model-quality or ship-readiness claim
